business_hours.notes: Limited Saturday hours from May to September: 08:00 to 12:00

emergency_definition: Building is uncomfortable or at risk
Office building AC out on a Monday morning

non_emergency_routing_rules.message_to_caller: Short and professional. We'll make it efficient.

call_transfer_rules.pre_transfer_message: Short and professional. That's what I want.

integration_constraints: Do not create work orders in ServiceTitan. Pam handles that.
after_hours_flow_summary: After-hours calls are handled by on-call techs. If Pam is unavailable, go to the on-call tech.
office_hours_flow_summary: During business hours, callers are routed to Pam first. If Pam doesn't answer, go to the on-call tech.
questions_or_unknowns: VIP routing rule for Pinnacle Hotels
notes: Pinnacle Hotels have a separate priority line.
